name: Star Royalties Ltd.
description: Star Royalties Ltd. is a precious metals and decarbonization solutions royalty and streaming company. The firm creates wealth by structuring creative investments that prioritize stakeholder alignment, strong corporate governance, and commitments to environmental stewardship. Their mining royalties portfolio provides exposure to precious metals in Tier 1 jurisdictions, while their Green Star Royalties joint venture invests in North American carbon offset projects and renewable energy. By focusing on cash-flowing and near-cash-flowing opportunities, Star Royalties aims to provide significant growth and valuation upside in both the precious metals and energy transition markets.
